subject: IBAS trigger n. 6138 is not a GRB
body:
D. Gotz (CEA Saclay) on behalf of the IBAS localization Team reports:

IBAS trigger n. 6138 is not due to a GRB but to 1A 0535+262, currently  
in outburst, that was not corretcly localized due to incorrect  
attitude information at satellite level.

This message can be cited.
